name: Repeat
content:
Repeat the sounds inside the block for the number of times specified
Most songs have lyrics that need to be played in a specific order, like the Verse of a song
You can use loops to repeat a backing track underneath the lyrics
If tracks have different lengths, they'll need different loops
If they have the same length, you can play them together in the same loop
Key Takeaway: Use loops to create backing tracks for your lyrics. Use different loops when tracks have different lengths.

palette_params.name: count
palette_params.description: The number of times to repeat.

tips: If this block is used inside a [`play together`(#94E4FF)](/docs/ide/music/expressions/play_together) block, the sounds will still be played sequentially.
